creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Enhancement request: 

* suppress the globe/planet icons

– their appearance is rather 'last century'. 

Thanks

---

If not possible (or not easy) within the constraints of MoinMoin: 

* close this bug

* individual users can override style, e.g. 
  <https://userstyles.world/style/2418/planet-free-wiki-freebsd-org>
